aiCommentCN: 跌起来了，散户的心也跟着跳跃
aiCommentEN: Market drops, hearts jump with it
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会继续震荡。
【关键位置】
当前价位69,484美元，需关注70,000美元阻力位。
【短线策略】
可尝试低位买入，高位卖出。
【风险提醒】
恐慌贪婪指数较低，需谨慎交易。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin may continue to fluctuate in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current price is $69,484, with a key resistance at $70,000.
[Outlook]
Consider buying at low points and selling at high points.
[Reminder]
The fear and greed index is low, so trade with caution.
